description: Add color picker section to CardEditorPanel that displays color swatches and syncs color changes in real time with the selected card
steps: Step 1: Import GROUP_COLORS from ./taskConstants in CardEditorPanel.jsx
Step 2: Add a color state variable synced with selectedNode.color in the existing useEffect
Step 3: Add a color picker UI section between Title and Content showing clickable swatches using dotColor classes from GROUP_COLORS
Step 4: Implement click handler that updates local color state and calls onUpdateNode({ color: selectedColorId }) for immediate sync
Step 5: Highlight the currently selected color swatch with a ring or border indicator
acceptance_criteria: A color state variable is added and synced from selectedNode.color when the selected card changes
Clickable color swatches are rendered between the Title and Content sections
Clicking a swatch immediately calls onUpdateNode({ color: colorId })
The currently selected color is visually highlighted
Switching cards updates the color state to match the new card's color
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/Clear-mind && npm run build' and confirm it succeeds with no errors
findings: Build passes with pre-existing chunk size warning (835KB). No test suite exists. Color picker implemented between Title and Content sections with real-time sync via onUpdateNode.
